title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively based on studying Anthropic engineers' practices: prompt skills not models, recognize skills as more than prompts, build composable reusable skills, and expect skills to improve with each session. The video argues most people prompt Claude incorrectly and teaches practical patterns for organizing and controlling skill invocation.
